$comment: CONTROLLED allowlist — built incrementally, ONE SLICE AT A TIME. Never bulk-copied from legacy chattr. Process when a migrated slice needs a dependency: (1) confirm it with Jon and add it here, (2) THEN move the code. Anything in a package.json or pyproject.toml not listed here fails check-deps and the gates. The repo starts EMPTY — no deps are permitted yet; they get added only as the slice that needs them is migrated.
